song.title: Complete In Thee
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C E
song.lyrics:
[v1] . E B 1) Complete in Thee no work of mine . C#m A May take, dear Lord, the place of Thine; . E B Thy blood hath pardon bought for me, . A B E And I am now complete in Thee [c] . E B Yea, justified! O blessed thought! . C#m A And sanctified! Salvation wrought! . E B Thy blood hath pardon bought for me, . A B E And glorified, I too, shall be! [v2] . E B 2) Complete in Thee, no more shall sin, . C#m A Thy grace hath conquered, reign within; . E B Thy voice shall bid the tempter flee, . A B E And I shall stand complete in Thee [v3] . E B 3) Complete in Thee, each want supplied, . C#m A And no good thing to me denied; . E B Since Thou my portion, Lord, wilt be, . A B E I ask no more, complete in Thee -!!
[v4] . E B 4) Dear Savior, when before Thy bar . C#m A All tribes and tongues assembled are, . E B Among Thy chosen will I be, . A B E At Thy right hand—complete in Thee
[E] 1) Complete in Thee! no work of mine May take, dear Lord, the place of Thine; Thy blood hath pardon bought for me, And I am now complete in Thee Chorus Yea, justified! O blessed thought! And sanctified! Salvation wrought! Thy blood hath pardon bought for me, And glorified, I too, shall be! 2) Complete in Thee—no more shall sin, Thy grace hath conquered, reign within; Thy voice shall bid the tempter flee, And I shall stand complete in Thee 3) Complete in Thee—each want supplied, And no good thing to me denied; Since Thou my portion, Lord, wilt be, I ask no more, complete in Thee 4) Dear Savior! when before Thy bar All tribes and tongues assembled are, Among Thy chosen will I be, At Thy right hand—complete in Thee
